ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain or category of the item */,
  "generation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation type for the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., armor, shield, etc.) */,
  "item_level" INTEGER /* Level of the item */,
  "spawn_weighting" TEXT /* Spawn weighting for the item */,
  "corrupted" INTEGER /* Whether the item is corrupted or not */,
  "base_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base item (for corrupted or modified items) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_type FOREIGN KEY ("item_type") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_generation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_type_id") REFERENCES generation_types ("generation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generation_types" (
  "generation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation type */,
  "generation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affixes" (
  "affix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affix */,
  "affix_name" TEXT /* Name of the affix */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the affix on item attributes */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the effect */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the effect */,
  "affix_type" TEXT /* Type of the affix (e.g., prefix, suffix, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spawn_weightings" (
  "weighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spawn weighting */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the item can spawn */,
  "enemy_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy type that can drop the item */,
  "spawn_chance" REAL /* Chance of the item spawning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spawn_weightings_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spawn_weightings_enemy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_type_id") REFERENCES enemy_types ("enemy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spawn_weightings_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemy_types" (
  "enemy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enemy type */,
  "enemy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the enemy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enemy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enemy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item statistic */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_stats_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_affixes" (
  "item_affix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-affix association */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "affix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affix */,
  "affix_level" INTEGER /* Level of the affix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_affix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_affixes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_affixes_affix_id FOREIGN KEY ("affix_id") REFERENCES affixes ("affix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_corruptions" (
  "corruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corruption */,
  "corruption_name" TEXT /* Name of the corruption */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the corruption on item attributes */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the effect */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corruption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_corruption_levels" (
  "item_corruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-corruption association */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corrupted item */,
  "corruption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corruption */,
  "corruption_level" INTEGER /* Level of the corruption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_corruption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_corruption_levels_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_corruption_levels_corruption_id FOREIGN KEY ("corruption_id") REFERENCES item_corruptions ("corruption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_spawn_history" (
  "spawn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spawn event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spawned item */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the item spawned */,
  "enemy_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy type that dropped the item */,
  "spawn_time" TEXT /* Time when the item spawned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spawn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_spawn_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_spawn_history_enemy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_type_id") REFERENCES enemy_types ("enemy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_spawn_history_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
